observations.answer: The synthetic Keystone call is at 2:00 PM today only; I will not store it as durable memory.

Keystone is evaluating security and procurement fit; Jordan Lee is champion. External meetings start at 11:00 AM or later, need a 20-minute buffer, and Tuesday mornings are protected. CRM and calendar facts require source-system verification.
